content.text:
[Tue 2026-04-07 13:10 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: FULL CSS overhaul for DnD Companion App.

Read ~/dnd-app/frontend/styles.css (current ~1530 lines) and ~/dnd-app/frontend/index.html (1899 lines).

REWRITE ~/dnd-app/frontend/styles.css completely. Keep ALL existing class names working — the HTML uses them. Just make everything look premium.

## Design: "Functional Fantasy"
- Dark theme: #0d121b background
- Gold/amber accent: #d4a73a primary
- Ember red for danger/HP: #c44b2f
- Display font: Cinzel serif for headers
- Body font: Inter/system-ui
- Mono: JetBrains Mono for stats/numbers

## Pages to style (all exist in index.html):

### Login (PIN auth)
- Centered dark card
- Gold PIN dots
- Cinzel "D&D Companion" title
- Subtle gold border

### Bottom Tab Bar (5 tabs: Combat, Party, Inventory, Spells, More)
- Fixed bottom, 64px height
- Dark blur backdrop
- Gold active tab
- Icons + labels

### More Page (16 feature buttons in 2-col grid)
- class: .more-card-btn
- Premium cards: gradient bg, gold left border, hover lift+glow
- Each card 90px+ height
- Emoji icons centered
- MUST scroll past bottom tabs (padding-bottom: 80px+)

### Combat/Flow
- Turn tracker
- Initiative list
- HP bars (red/green gradient)
- Action buttons (gold primary)
- Round counter

### Party Overview
- Character cards with avatar placeholder
- HP/AC/Level badges
- Class icons

### Monsters/Bestiary
- class: .monster-card, .monster-grid
- Search bar with gold focus
- Monster cards: CR badge, type indicator
- Expandable details

### Spells
- class: .spell-card
- Level badge (color coded)
- School of magic
- Concentration indicator
- Filter chips

### Character Sheet
- Ability scores grid (STR/DEX/CON/INT/WIS/CHA)
- Stat modifiers
- Spell slots tracker
- Notes textarea

### NPCs
- class: .npc-card, .npc-grid
- NPC cards with relationship indicator

### Map
- Canvas container
- Grid overlay toggle
- Token placement

### General Components
- .btn-gold, .btn-sm — gold buttons
- .tab-header h1 — Cinzel serif, gold
- .tab-pane — scroll padding for bottom tabs
- inputs/selects — dark bg, gold focus border
- modals — backdrop blur, gold top border
- tables — dark rows, gold headers
- scrollbar — thin, gold thumb
- selection — gold highlight
- .badge — small pill badges
- .card — dark surface with border

## CRITICAL:
- Write COMPLETE styles.css — every line
- Keep ALL class names from current file
- Every .tab-pane needs padding-bottom: 80px (bottom tabs)
- Mobile-first (max-width: 480px viewport)
- 48px minimum touch targets
- 16px base font (prevent iOS zoom)
- Test: imagine tapping each button at 11pm with dice in hand
